problem id: b3a9b053
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  10111000 -> 00000001
  01110011 -> 01100010
  00111011 -> 01100000
  10010010 -> 00000100
  10110110 -> 01000101
  00000101 -> 00000000
  01101100 -> 10000000
  11111011 -> 01100111
  10101100 -> 00000001
  01110101 -> 10100010

query: 11000110
predicted answer: 10000100
